message: feat: add iter-0008 hotkey binding domain

files.patch:
@@ -6,21 +6,150 @@ enum RecordingMode: Equatable, Sendable {
     case toggleToTalk
 }
 
+enum HotkeyBindingAction: String, CaseIterable, Codable, Equatable, Sendable {
+    case pushToTalk
+    case toggleToTalk
+
+    var storageKey: String {
+        "chordBinding.\(rawValue)"
+    }
+}
+
 enum HotkeyEffect: Equatable, Sendable {
     case start(RecordingMode)
     case stop
     case restart(RecordingMode)
 }
 
-enum HotkeyKey: UInt16, Codable, CaseIterable, Hashable, Sendable {
-    case tab = 48
-    case space = 49
-    case rightCommand = 54
-    case rightOption = 61
+struct HotkeyKey: RawRepresentable, Codable, CaseIterable, Hashable, Sendable {
+    let rawValue: UInt16
+
+    static let returnKey = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 36)!
+    static let tab = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 48)!
+    static let space = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 49)!
+    static let delete = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 51)!
+    static let escape = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 53)!
+    static let rightCommand = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 54)!
+    static let leftCommand = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 55)!
+    static let leftShift = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 56)!
+    static let capsLock = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 57)!
+    static let leftOption = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 58)!
+    static let leftControl = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 59)!
+    static let rightShift = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 60)!
+    static let rightOption = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 61)!
+    static let rightControl = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 62)!
+    static let fn = HotkeyKey(rawValue: 63)!
+
+    static let allCases: [HotkeyKey] = [
+        .returnKey,
+        .tab,
+        .space,
+        .delete,
+        .escape,
+        .rightCommand,
+        .leftCommand,
+        .leftShift,
+        .capsLock,
+        .leftOption,
+        .leftControl,
+        .rightShift,
+        .rightOption,
+        .rightControl,
+        .fn
+    ]
+
+    init?(rawValue: UInt16) {
+        self.rawValue = rawValue
+    }
 
     var isModifier: Bool {
         rawValue >= 54 && rawValue <= 63
     }
+
+    var displayName: String {
+        switch rawValue {
+        case 36:
+            return "Return"
+        case 48:
+            return "Tab"
+        case 49:
+            return "Space"
+        case 51:
+            return "Delete"
+        case 53:
+            return "Escape"
+        case 54:
+            return "Right Command"
+        case 55:
+            return "Left Command"
+        case 56:
+            return "Left Shift"
+        case 57:
+            return "Caps Lock"
+        case 58:
+            return "Left Option"
+        case 59:
+            return "Left Control"
+        case 60:
+            return "Right Shift"
+        case 61:
+            return "Right Option"
+        case 62:
+            return "Right Control"
+        case 63:
+            return "Fn / Globe"
+        default:
+            return "Key Code \(rawValue)"
+        }
+    }
+
+    var compactDisplayName: String {
+        switch rawValue {
+        case 54:
+            return "⌘ʳ"
+        case 55:
+            return "⌘ˡ"
+        case 56:
+            return "⇧ˡ"
+        case 57:
+            return "⇪"
+        case 58:
+            return "⌥ˡ"
+        case 59:
+            return "⌃ˡ"
+        case 60:
+            return "⇧ʳ"
+        case 61:
+            return "⌥ʳ"
+        case 62:
+            return "⌃ʳ"
+        case 63:
+            return "fn"
+        default:
+            return displayName
+        }
+    }
+
+    fileprivate var displaySortKey: (Int, String, UInt16) {
+        (displaySortRank, displayName, rawValue)
+    }
+
+    private var displaySortRank: Int {
+        switch rawValue {
+        case 54, 55:
+            return 0
+        case 58, 61:
+            return 1
+        case 59, 62:
+            return 2
+        case 56, 57, 60:
+            return 3
+        case 63:
+            return 4
+        default:
+            return 5
+        }
+    }
 }
 
 enum HotkeyEventSnapshot: Equatable, Sendable {
@@ -52,6 +181,20 @@ struct HotkeyChord: Codable, Equatable, Sendable {
         Set(keyCodes.compactMap(HotkeyKey.init(rawValue:)))
     }
 
+    var sortedKeys: [HotkeyKey] {
+        keys.sorted { lhs, rhs in
+            lhs.displaySortKey < rhs.displaySortKey
+        }
+    }
+
+    var displayString: String {
+        sortedKeys.map(\.displayName).joined(separator: " + ")
+    }
+
+    var compactDisplayString: String {
+        sortedKeys.map(\.compactDisplayName).joined(separator: " + ")
+    }
+
     init(from decoder: any Decoder) throws {
         let container = try decoder.container(keyedBy: CodingKeys.self)
         let codes = try container.decode(Set<UInt16>.self, forKey: .keyCodes)
@@ -70,6 +213,15 @@ struct HotkeyBindings: Equatable, Sendable {
         pushToTalk: try! HotkeyChord(keys: [.rightCommand, .rightOption]),
         toggleToTalk: try! HotkeyChord(keys: [.rightCommand, .rightOption, .space])
     )
+
+    func chord(for action: HotkeyBindingAction) -> HotkeyChord {
+        switch action {
+        case .pushToTalk:
+            return pushToTalk
+        case .toggleToTalk:
+            return toggleToTalk
+        }
+    }
 }
 
 final class HotkeyEngine {

@@ -91,6 +91,38 @@ final class HotkeyMonitorTests: XCTestCase {
         await Task.yield()
         XCTAssertEqual(effects, [.start(.pushToTalk)])
     }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testUpdateBindingsRebuildsTheChordEngineWithTheNewChordMap() async throws {
+        let factory = RecordingHotkeyEventTapSessionFactory()
+        let monitor = GlobalHotkeyMonitor(
+            accessibilityChecker: StubAccessibilityPermissionChecker(isTrusted: true),
+            eventTapSessionFactory: factory
+        )
+        var effects: [HotkeyEffect] = []
+        let updatedBindings = HotkeyBindings(
+            pushToTalk: try HotkeyChord(keys: [.leftCommand, .leftControl]),
+            toggleToTalk: try HotkeyChord(keys: [.leftCommand, .leftControl, .space])
+        )
+
+        try monitor.start(bindings: .defaultBindings) { effect in
+            effects.append(effect)
+        }
+        monitor.updateBindings(updatedBindings)
+
+        let session = try XCTUnwrap(factory.sessions.first)
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand))
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightOption))
+        await Task.yield()
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [])
+
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightOption))
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.rightCommand))
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.leftCommand))
+        session.emit(.flagsChanged(.leftControl))
+        await Task.yield()
+        XCTAssertEqual(effects, [.start(.pushToTalk)])
+    }
 }
 
 private struct StubAccessibilityPermissionChecker: AccessibilityPermissionChecking {

@@ -45,6 +45,33 @@ final class SettingsStoreTests: XCTestCase {
         XCTAssertNotNil(defaults.data(forKey: "chordBinding.pushToTalk"))
     }
 
+    func testUpdatingHotkeyBindingPersistsTheChordUnderTheActionKey() throws {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        let chord = try HotkeyChord(keys: [.leftCommand, .leftControl])
+
+        try store.updateHotkeyBinding(chord, for: .pushToTalk)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.pushToTalkChord, chord)
+        let storedData = try XCTUnwrap(defaults.data(forKey: "chordBinding.pushToTalk"))
+        XCTAssertEqual(try JSONDecoder().decode(HotkeyChord.self, from: storedData), chord)
+    }
+
+    func testUpdatingHotkeyBindingRejectsDuplicateAssignments() throws {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        let originalPushToTalk = store.pushToTalkChord
+
+        XCTAssertThrowsError(
+            try store.updateHotkeyBinding(store.toggleToTalkChord, for: .pushToTalk)
+        ) { error in
+            XCTAssertEqual(
+                error as? HotkeyBindingStoreError,
+                .duplicateBinding(action: .toggleToTalk)
+            )
+        }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.pushToTalkChord, originalPushToTalk)
+    }
+
     func testUpdatingSpeechModelPersistsToUserDefaults() throws {
         let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class ShortcutCaptureStateMachineTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testCaptureCompletesWhenAllKeysAreReleased() throws {
+        let stateMachine = ShortcutCaptureStateMachine()
+
+        XCTAssertNil(stateMachine.process(.keyPressed(.rightCommand)))
+        XCTAssertNil(stateMachine.process(.keyPressed(.rightOption)))
+        XCTAssertNil(stateMachine.process(.keyReleased(.rightCommand)))
+
+        let chord = try XCTUnwrap(stateMachine.process(.keyReleased(.rightOption)))
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(chord, try HotkeyChord(keys: [.rightCommand, .rightOption]))
+        XCTAssertEqual(stateMachine.pressedKeys, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(stateMachine.capturedKeys, [])
+    }
+
+    func testCaptureStaysActiveWhileAnyKeyRemainsPressed() {
+        let stateMachine = ShortcutCaptureStateMachine()
+
+        XCTAssertNil(stateMachine.process(.keyPressed(.rightCommand)))
+        XCTAssertNil(stateMachine.process(.keyPressed(.rightOption)))
+
+        let chord = stateMachine.process(.keyReleased(.rightCommand))
+
+        XCTAssertNil(chord)
+        XCTAssertEqual(stateMachine.pressedKeys, [.rightOption])
+        XCTAssertEqual(stateMachine.capturedKeys, [.rightCommand, .rightOption])
+    }
+}
